src: A gray and white cat with short fur, bright golden eyes, long white whiskers, black nose, and a white chest patch. Its ears are pointed.
edit: A blocky multi-colored lego figure with exaggerated features. It has a square head, yellow eyes, a black circular nose, and a blocky body of grey, white, and green bricks. Upturned components mimic ears, with smooth and textured pieces.

per_image_non_shared_src.erik-jan-leusink-T0kalkwgc0w-unsplash: The object is sitting upright on a wooden floor, head tilted slightly upwards, with visible wood grains and shadows beneath it, in an indistinct, neutral surrounding.
per_image_non_shared_src.erik-jan-leusink-uamiRCpAmrU-unsplash: the object is lying on a bed with patterned green and white sheets, front paws visible. The surface is soft and slightly crumpled, with blurred natural elements in the background.
per_image_non_shared_src.erik-jan-leusink-x01ntt6tNDc-unsplash: the object is nestled against a gray textured cushion with a tight weave, its head resting comfortably, in softly lit natural light casting gentle shadows.

per_image_non_shared_edit.erik-jan-leusink-T0kalkwgc0w-unsplash: The object is resting on a dark, polished floor with its head turned upwards, casting subtle shadows. The floor has a reflective sheen and dim glow highlighting the object's contours, amidst a dark, tranquil environment.
per_image_non_shared_edit.erik-jan-leusink-uamiRCpAmrU-unsplash: The object rests on a bed with dark blue and black patterned sheets, front paws nestled. The bedding has a star design, capturing a night essence, with blurred silhouettes in the background.
per_image_non_shared_edit.erik-jan-leusink-x01ntt6tNDc-unsplash: The object is against a deep navy blue textured cushion, its head resting on it. Moonlight casts soft shadows, enhancing the calm ambiance.
